prompt: Start by using @a for this design-only task. Update README.md with a short rollout note that explains how a shared normalization helper could reduce duplication between render_title() and render_subtitle(), what risks to watch for, and why the refactor should stay bounded. Keep it docs-only and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: README.md gains a concise design note with tradeoffs or rollout risks
The transcript shows architect-style solution output
The final response includes the required footer
must_not: Turn the note into a broad redesign
